daniel-negreanu.reason: Daniel Negreanu can appear across standings, POY, HOF, and result contexts. Multiple mentions are allowed, but final profile target should remain consistent.

sample-calculation-scope.reason: Fixture only includes sample rows, so profile summary total earnings cannot be strictly recalculated from sample result rows.

legacy-result-format.reason: Some old result pages may have legacy formatting or missing profile links. Treat link-only mismatch as warning if player name and row data are visible.

current-site-data-changed.reason: Public WSOP data may change after fixture generation. If current UI differs from fixture, classify as expected data stale or product issue after manual review.
